topErrorDrivers.mechanism: GPT reads Preço Unitário 9,99 from adjacent Açúcar row (row below) instead of correct 29,99 on Chocolate row
topErrorDrivers.stability: 9,99 unit_price in 3/3 v25 PDF probes; qty stable at 2 in runs 1-2, dropped to 1 in run 3

topErrorDrivers.mechanism: Line total 13,10 used as unit_price with qty=1 instead of qty=2 × 6,55
topErrorDrivers.stability: Identical wrong parse in 3/3 probes; total preserved so no € impact

topErrorDrivers.product: Filete de Anchoas Alcofinosa L4 495 g

structuralFamily.name: Aviludo dense-table column isolation
relatedCases: Açúcar qty bleed (FIXED by Pass C refinement — digit 9 from 9,99 → qty)
Chocolate price bleed (OPEN — entire 9,99 from adjacent row → unit_price)
Atum qty/unit conflation (OPEN field-only — line total as unit_price)
structuralFamily.isolatedVsFamily: Chocolate is same structural family as solved Açúcar case but inverted direction (price column bleeds from row below rather than qty digit from price). Not an isolated one-off.

smallestFixCategory.recommendation: Add Aviludo Chocolate worked example adjacent to existing Açúcar rule: Preço Unitário must come from the SAME row; Chocolate 2 CX @ 29,99 = 59,98 — BAD example if unit_price reads 9,99 from Açúcar row below
alternativesRejected: Geometry/crop change — table fully visible, 8/8 rows extracted
Schema enforcement — structured fields not blocking; wrong values returned
Pack multiplier — Chocolate unit is CX (case); error is wrong price not pack inference
smallestFixCategory.productionCodeSurface: prompt only (no geometry, binder, or persistence change)

expectedVLImprovement.fieldAccuracyImpact: Recovers 2 wrong fields (Chocolate unit_price + total) on 32 field comparisons → ~+6pp on May invoice; modest global lift
expectedVLImprovement.note: Atum qty/unit fix would improve field accuracy but not € error (total already matches)
